channel.title: SAQ on pcidss.ae | PCI DSS Compliance & Payment Security UAE
channel.description: Recent content in SAQ on pcidss.ae | PCI DSS Compliance & Payment Security UAE

item.title: SAQ Types Explained: Which PCI DSS SAQ Does Your UAE Business Need?
item.description: The most common PCI DSS mistake is selecting the wrong SAQ type. This guide explains every SAQ type and how to determine which one your UAE business needs for annual acquiring bank submission.
